title: Using the Quiz Converter Tool
text: ⌂ All guides 🔗 Copy link ↗ Open in new tab Using the Quiz Converter Tool By JONATHAN FROELICH 1 Navigate to https://sites.google.com/apps.isd742.org/quizextractor/home Select the Gem link that suits your needs best The left button will take an existing test you have (pdf, word doc etc) and convert it to code for the tool. All you need to do is upload your test and hit the submit button. The right option creates questions from scratch (Example: make me 50 questions about topic X, you can upload slide shows, documents, etc to use to create these questions)

title: How To Clean up Your Gmail
desc: Learn how to efficiently manage your inbox by moving large volumes of messages at once. This guide will help you streamline your workflow and keep your email organized with ease.
text: ⌂ All guides 🔗 Copy link ↗ Open in new tab How To Clean up Your Gmail Learn how to efficiently manage your inbox by moving large volumes of messages at once. This guide will help you streamline your workflow and keep your email organized with ease. 1 Step 1: Head to your Gmail inbox 2 Click the "select" button near the top left corner as shown Alternatively you can search for specific emails you want to save. Find those emails (by sender, date, etc) and follow the same directions below starting on Step 4.
